strategy_hypotheses.evidence: STALE_0DTE fallback contributes 5 trades and $162.8, but breakout_long_no_0dte is the weak slice: 2 trades, $71, 40.5 PnL/hour, 52.6m median hold, avg MAE -210.6. EXPIRED_0DTE has one strong breakout winner, so the test must preserve positive fallback expectancy rather than simply deleting fallback trades.
strategy_hypotheses.name: No-0DTE Breakout Realization Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Tiny sample; stricter slope plus smaller adaptive cap can either improve stale fallback efficiency or suppress the single expired-0DTE convex winner with little portfolio benefit.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: STALE_0DTE or EXPIRED_0DTE breakout_long_no_0dte entries where 0DTE option confirmation is unavailable and the strategy must rely on ES continuation quality.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Fallback PnL remains positive, fallback PnL/hour improves above the current aggregate 83.2 and stale breakout 40.5, fallback worst MAE is flat or better, VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count is unchanged, total net profit remains >=98% of run_044, and total risk-adjusted score is flat or better.

changes.reason: Batch B only. squeeze_long is clean by tail metrics but under-realizing relative to its continuation context: 10 VALID_0DTE trades, $740 PnL, worst MAE only -232.2, and no slow trades. Step the adaptive cap from 6.5 to the next convexity-friendly grid value without reopening entries.

Raise fixed TP from 3.75 to 4.25, a middle grid value below the prior duplicate 4.5 setting. This tests whether the clean squeeze sleeve can capture more continuation while avoiding a repeated keyset.

Pair the higher realization target with modestly stronger VWAP continuation confirmation. Moving from 0.04 to 0.05 is less aggressive than the prior 0.06 duplicate/reversion path and should protect against paying for larger targets in flat continuation.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should improve squeeze_long PnL and total growth quality by letting the clean continuation sleeve hold for a slightly larger target, while keeping admission quality tied to stronger VWAP slope. Main tradeoff is longer hold time or underpayment if the current 3.75 target is already optimal; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_044, squeeze PnL/hour drops, or worst MAE worsens materially.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_b_squeeze_long_take_profit. The leader base is already strong, and broad entry/veto tuning has either overfiltered or repeated rejected paths. squeeze_long is a protected, clean VALID_0DTE edge with 10 trades, $740 PnL, no slow >=12h trades, and the best worst-MAE profile among active option-confirmed sleeves. This is a non-duplicate middle-grid realization test: more upside than current 6.5/3.75/0.04, less aggressive than the prior repeated 8/4.5/0.06 keyset.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: squeeze_long produced 10 VALID_0DTE trades, $740 PnL, $189.3/hour, 100% win rate, no slow trades, and worst MAE -232.2. Its clean tail profile makes it a better place to seek risk-adjusted profit expansion than call_wall_acceptance_long, which owns the -655.2 MAE tail.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Squeeze Mid-Convexity Realization Probe
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample; larger targets can lengthen exposure or miss fast realizations, reducing PnL/hour even if per-trade upside improves.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE squeeze_long entries with option-map confirmation and positive ES VWAP continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: squeeze_long PnL and total net profit improve or stay within 98% of run_044, squeeze PnL/hour remains >=189, completed trades drop <=10%, slow_12h remains 0, and total worst MAE is no worse than the current -655.2.

changes.reason: Batch A only. The worst portfolio MAE is the call_wall_acceptance_long convex recovery; requiring 60 seconds of strike acceptance tests whether transient wall touches can be filtered without disabling the profile or touching global vetoes.

Retest the accepted call-wall realization cap from the leader-family branch. This profile has only 2 trades but owns -655.2 MAE, so the first lever should be target containment rather than entry deletion.

Set a moderate fixed realization target for call-wall acceptance so it can monetize accepted-wall continuation before exposure stretches into deep heat. This is narrower than the current wide selected target behavior but not a hard stop or broad filter.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should reduce call_wall_acceptance_long hold time, average MAE, and exposure drag while preserving most of the rare convex call-wall PnL. Main risk is underpaying the largest winner; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001/run_044 leader, call-wall PnL retention is below 70%, or pnl_per_exposure_hour falls.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long. The current leader is plateaued at 103 trades and $7532.8, with no realized losses or slow 12h trades, so the only meaningful risk-adjusted weakness is hidden intratrade heat. call_wall_acceptance_long contributes $640.5 on 2 VALID_0DTE trades and the best profile PnL/hour, but also owns the -655.2 worst MAE. This experiment contains the call-wall sleeve through persistence and realization shape, not broad entry-veto tightening or stop losses.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The worst call-wall trade made $546 but required 120 minutes and -655.2 MAE; latest stats show call_wall_acceptance_long has $640.5 PnL, $290.3/hour, 2 trades, and average MAE -333.7. Static broad filters would either delete too much PnL or fail to improve kept worst MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a two-trade profile and cut rare convex recoveries unless validated against protected fast winners and out-of-sample days.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long entry with wide selected target or extended ES-VWAP that fails to convert early favorable movement into sustained continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce call-wall worst MAE below -655.2 while retaining at least 70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better, and slow_12h remains 0.

changes.reason: Single-family dormant companion attribution probe. VALID_1DTE_ONLY is a real edge with 20 trades, $1315.3 PnL, and no slow trades, but breakout_long_1dte has mediocre efficiency at $170/hour and worst MAE -386.75. Add pullback_long_1dte to the 1DTE router to test whether the existing pullback companion can capture reclaim-like 1DTE states without touching the proven breakout profile thresholds.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should expose whether 1DTE pullback/reclaim routing is reachable and additive. The desired outcome is positive standalone pullback_long_1dte attribution or improved combined 1DTE PnL/hour/MAE while preserving breakout_long_1dte PnL. Main tradeoff is cannibalization: reject if combined 1DTE PnL falls, total net profit drops below 98% of the leader, completed trades fall more than 10%, or VALID_0DTE attribution changes unexpectedly.
recommendation.label: one-dte-pullback-companion-probe
recommendation.rationale: Use the concept activation exception as exactly one logical family: a router-only 1DTE companion split. The leader is plateaued at $7532.8 with no slow trades, and recent direct call-wall, squeeze, no-0DTE, and surgical-veto keysets are either duplicate, flat, or profit-suppressive. The underexplored 1DTE sleeve is large enough to matter and should be split by routing before tightening a known profitable breakout_long_1dte profile. Because pullback_long_1dte is already enabled but absent from the one-dte router, this is the smallest legal attribution test.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributes 20 trades, $1315.3 PnL, $170.1 PnL/hour, 100% win rate, no slow trades, and worst MAE -386.75. Hidden signatures show blocking breakout_long_1dte would retain only 82.5% PnL and does not solve portfolio worst MAE, so the correct test is a companion split rather than direct tightening.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The companion may be unreachable or may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades without adding net PnL or improving MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than clean breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL stays at or above $1315.3, combined 1DTE PnL/hour improves above $170/hour, 1DTE worst MAE is flat or better than -386.75, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL is explicitly measured, total net profit remains >=98% of leader, and slow_12h remains 0.
